name: OIC Relaxed Rules
description: Minimal ruleset for Oracle Integration Cloud - recommended for rapid development and prototyping

rules.name: Global Fault Handler
rules.description: Integration must have a global fault handler to catch unexpected errors

rules.name: Scope Fault Handler
rules.description: Critical scopes should have dedicated fault handlers

rules.name: Retry Policy Configuration
rules.description: Service invocations should have retry policies configured

rules.name: Logging Activity
rules.description: Integration should include logging activities for debugging

rules.name: Correlation ID Tracking
rules.description: Integration should track correlation IDs for request tracing

rules.name: Loop Iteration Limit
rules.description: Loops should have maximum iteration limits to prevent infinite loops

rules.name: Timeout Configuration
rules.description: Service invocations should have appropriate timeout values

rules.name: Pagination Support
rules.description: Large data queries should implement pagination

rules.name: Hardcoded Credentials
rules.description: No hardcoded credentials should be present in the integration

rules.name: HTTPS Endpoints
rules.description: All external endpoints should use HTTPS protocol

rules.name: Input Validation
rules.description: Input data should be validated before processing

rules.name: Large Integration Modularization
rules.description: Large integrations should be broken down into reusable sub-integrations

rules.name: Reusability Opportunity
rules.description: Repeated logic should be extracted into reusable components

rules.name: Integration Description
rules.description: Integration should have a clear description

rules.name: Connection Documentation
rules.description: Connections should be documented with purpose and configuration

rules.name: Integration Naming Convention
rules.description: Integration names should follow UPPER_SNAKE_CASE convention

rules.name: Connection Naming Convention
rules.description: Connection names should be descriptive and include _CONN suffix

rules.name: Lookup Naming Convention
rules.description: Lookup names should include _LKP or _LOOKUP suffix

rules.name: Mapping Naming Convention
rules.description: Mapping names should include _MAP or _XFORM suffix

rules.name: Scope Naming Convention
rules.description: Scope names should start with 'Scope_' prefix

rules.name: Activity Naming Convention
rules.description: Activity names should follow type-specific prefixes

rules.name: XML Structure Validation
rules.description: Integration XML should be well-formed and valid

rules.name: Package Structure
rules.description: Integration package should follow standard structure
